name: Restaurant Owner - Square POS Outreach
subject: How {{first_name}} can get better insights from Square
htmlContent:
Hi {{first_name}},

I noticed {{company_name}} is using Square for POS — great platform for getting started.

Here's what I'm seeing with restaurants like yours:

  • High-level insights — Did we make money? Who's our top performer?
  • Deep operational detail — Inventory trends, waste tracking, staff performance
  • Day-to-day simplification — No more jumping between Square, spreadsheets, and other tools

Most existing solutions force you to choose: simplicity OR depth. We built something that does both.

Would love to grab 15 minutes this week to see if it's a fit for {{company_name}}. No pressure — just a quick conversation.

Available Tuesday or Wednesday afternoon. Does one of those work?

Thanks,
{{sender_name}}

{{company_name}} • {{location}}
